posts.author: 2025meli (Ian)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Updates icon not available in items on a table widget within the Project INFO of a Portfolio

What are you trying to achieve

I want to be able to add an update like when I access a board. The updates button not available on the table when the table is in a widget of the Portfolio Project Info section.
